title: Lazy Sunday Sweetbread
description: A low-carb-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring a fluffy and bitter sweetbread made with minimal effort, served with an icing sugar glaze for a touch of sweetness.
instructions: In a large bowl, beat eggs until frothy.
Mix in icing sugar, flour, baking powder, and vanilla extract. Stir gently until just combined but not overmixed.
Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan or shallow dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top and cooked through when tested with a toothpick inserted in the center.
Cool slightly, then drizzle with icing sugar glaze before serving.
